note: Code-navigation where/how tasks for the context A/B. Ground truth verified against the checkout (paths relative to the sandbox repo root). 'kind' tags whether the answer is directly greppable (parity expected) or semantic (Axil-favored).

tasks.task: Where is the module-level `url_for` helper defined?

ground_truth.notes: Module-level url_for (~line 200); Flask.url_for in app.py delegates to it — accept either.

tasks.task: Where does Flask dispatch an incoming request to the matched view function?
Where does Flask push the application context onto the context stack?

ground_truth.notes: class AppContext (~260), push (~416); RequestContext.push also acceptable.
blueprints.py re-exports (class Blueprint(SansioBlueprint) ~18); real definition at src/flask/sansio/blueprints.py (~119) — accept either.

tasks.task: Where does Flask load configuration from a Python file (from_pyfile)?
How does Flask turn a raised HTTPException into a response?
Where does the @app.route decorator actually register a URL rule?

ground_truth.notes: route (~336) or add_url_rule (scaffold ~368 / sansio/app.py ~605) — accept either.

tasks.task: Where is the `session` proxy object defined?
